title: Alpha Maloria
description: A Simple mod who adds fruits (base of crafting), weapons, dimensions and general stuff. Have fun! ^-^
body:
## Alpha Maloria
That's a simple mod that add some fruits, needed to craft other things like armors, potions, weapons, dimensions, and other stuff who'll help you to beat the ender dragon, and all textures are in a vanilla style! now you knows that, have fun with this mod! ^-^
